programme.desc: Ron Carpenter leads the Body of Christ to a new level and reaches out to the lost and hurting.

programme.desc: Laurie Crouch, Christine Caine, Toni Collier, Irene Rollins, and Julie Mullins explain how to use God's Word to find lasting freedom and a renewed mind.
